PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\miniERP_electronic V2\\backend" -Recurse | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\("D:\\miniERP_electronic V2\\backend\\",""\)}} | Format-Table Path -AutoSize)

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; ['bcrypt','uuid','@nestjs/jwt','@nestjs/swagger'].forEach\(d => console.log\(d, deps[d] ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; ['@types/bcrypt','@types/uuid'].forEach\(d => console.log\(d, deps[d] ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\)\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\miniERP_electronic V2\\backend"; $proc = Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -RedirectStandardOutput "app.log" -RedirectStandardError "app.err" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Get-Content app.log, app.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 25; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\(z.version || 'unknown'\); console.log\(typeof z.email\)")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('zod/v4'\); console.log\('ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('error:', e.message\) }")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod/v4'\); console.log\(typeof z.email, typeof z.object, typeof z.string\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; $be = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/health" -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "DOWN" }; $fe = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "DOWN" }; "Backend: $be | Frontend: $fe")

PowerShell($fe = try { \(Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop\); "UP" } catch { "DOWN" }; $be = try { \(Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:3001/health" -TimeoutSec 5\).status } catch { "DOWN" }; "Frontend: $fe | Backend: $be")
